creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zsolt from comment #4)

Hi Zsolt,


There was a bug that it was looking for the executable python3 instead of the real Python executable. It is fixed in 4.5.5_4.

When you will get a chance, please try 4.5.5_4. It should resolve this problem.


Thanks,
Yuri
